docs.text: MkDocs # Install for this repo # $ virtualenv --python python3.6 env $ source env/bin/activate $ pip install mkdocs $ pip install mkdocs-material Test in local # $ mkdocs serve Push to GitHub page # $ mkdocs gh-deploy
docs.title: MkDocs

docs.text: $ virtualenv --python python3.6 env $ source env/bin/activate $ pip install mkdocs $ pip install mkdocs-material
docs.title: Install for this repo

docs.text: TMUX # My prefix key # PREFIX = Ctrl-q Create window # PREFIX n Go to previous/next window # M-Left M-Right Swap (reorder) window # S-Left S-Right Rename window # PREFIX , Create pane # PREFIX | : split right PREFIX - : split down Copy mode # PREFIX [ : change to copy mode q : quit copy mode PREFIX v : select in copy mode PREFIX y : copy select in copy mode PREFIX ] : paste PREFIX p : paste FZF # C-f : open fzf in command mode man # PREFIX / : open man in command mode Useful functions # PREFIX w : open the dash board of all sessions and windows PREFIX s : open the dash board of all sessions PREFIX z : zoom in/out the current pane PREFIX t : show current time PREFIX ? : check all key bindings PREFIX : : change to command mode PREFIX C-k : clear history (scrollback buffer) Misc. # PREFIX r : reload config
docs.title: TMUX

docs.text: PREFIX | : split right PREFIX - : split down
docs.title: Create pane
